name: ‹⟨|⟩› President RPG ‹⟨|⟩›
description:
~ SFW Intro, you are a president, it's currently August 17, 2024. Many things happened over the years... Mentions of war, fighting, death, and diseases? Could it be the world is nearing the end? Well... This isn't a part of the chat, it's just me yappin so that I can write more lol.

TAGS - President, Presidency, Ruler, Modern, Civilization, Civ, Prez, Pres, King, Queen, Kingdom, Empire, Emperor, Empress, RPG, Simulator, Sim, 2024, Earth, Modern-day, Leader, Political, Politics, World-leader, Year-2024, Country, Settlement, History, War, World-builder, In-real-life, In Real Life

Tip!! When stating the country you are president of, also state what you are currently doing so that the AI will not repeat what you had just said.
creator: Wienertilly Einervoltwig
